title: Development and implementation of virtual instrumentation based on LabView applied to compression ignition engines operated with diesel-biodiesel blends
author: Pérez, Montero, et al.
materials: 1Radiator with a heat transfer area of 50 × 100 × 5 cm
2Water pump with a flow of 5.0 l/min.
3Container with a storage capacity of 100 l.
4Copper pipe of ¾” of diameter per 1/8” of thickness.
5Two fans, one of 110 VCA at 1.5 A, and the second of 12 VCD at 3 A.
